title: Quick Care Fix
shortDesc: Fast, focused help for one appointment, form, provider message, or record request.
longDesc: Sometimes you just need one thing handled — and handled right. The Quick Care Fix covers a single appointment booking, one form completed, one provider message chain managed, or one medical record request. It's ideal when you hit a wall and need a professional to step in, navigate the system, and get it done without the runaround. Note: This package does not include insurance calls, coordination across multiple providers, or any follow-up loops beyond the initial task.

title: Medication Safety Review
shortDesc: A thorough review of your full medication list with an interaction check and written summary.
longDesc: Taking multiple medications — whether prescribed, over-the-counter, or supplemental — carries real risks that often go unnoticed. This service includes a complete review of your medication list, a detailed interaction and safety check, and a clear written summary you can keep and share. One provider contact is included to clarify or flag concerns. This is a one-time review and does not cover ongoing monitoring or coordination with multiple prescribers.

title: Home Care Setup
shortDesc: End-to-end coordination to get the right home care agency in place and your first visit confirmed.
longDesc: Figuring out home care on your own can be confusing and time-consuming. This service handles the process from start to first visit: determining the right level of service for your needs, sending a referral to one agency, managing the intake process, and confirming your first appointment. It's designed to get things moving without you having to navigate agency red tape alone. Ongoing management after care begins or switching agencies are not included.

title: Equipment Coordination
shortDesc: Coordination of one piece of durable medical equipment — from order to delivery.
longDesc: Getting the right medical equipment delivered shouldn't require a second job. This service covers ordering one item through one supplier and coordinating delivery so it actually shows up. Whether it's a walker, hospital bed, CPAP supplies, or other durable medical equipment, we handle the logistics. Please note this package covers one item through one supplier and does not include insurance denials, repairs, or requests for multiple pieces of equipment.

title: Insurance Approval Project
shortDesc: Full management of one prior authorization — forms, documentation, and follow-up to decision.
longDesc: Prior authorizations are one of the most frustrating parts of the healthcare system. This service takes one authorization off your plate completely: we handle the paperwork, pull together supporting documentation, submit everything to your insurer, and follow up until a decision is reached. This covers one medication or procedure through one insurer. Appeals and requests covering multiple items are not included in this package.

title: 1-Hour Time Block
shortDesc: One hour of dedicated advocacy time for complex or unpredictable situations.
longDesc: When a situation doesn't fit neatly into a package — or starts to expand beyond its original scope — a Time Block gives you dedicated, professional time to work through it. Every minute counts: calls, portal navigation, research, and documentation all apply. Work stops when the block is used, and you'll be notified before any additional time is needed. A new block requires your approval before continuing. Best used when things get messy or when you need flexible, focused support without a predefined scope.

title: 3-Hour Time Block
shortDesc: Three hours of dedicated advocacy time for involved, multi-step situations.
longDesc: The 3-Hour Time Block is the right choice when you're dealing with a situation that's clearly going to take sustained effort — think a complicated discharge, a multi-step insurance issue, or a situation with several moving parts. All time spent on calls, portals, research, and documentation counts toward your block. You'll always be informed before the block runs out, and any continuation requires your explicit approval. No surprises, no runaway hours.

title: Monthly Essential Plan
shortDesc: Ongoing monthly coordination for individuals who need consistent, reliable healthcare support.
longDesc: The Monthly Essential Plan is built for people who need a steady hand navigating the healthcare system month to month. Included is ongoing coordination, proactive provider communication, medication updates as things change, and regular summaries for family members or caregivers who want to stay informed. This is not a 24/7 service and does not cover emergencies — it's thoughtful, professional support during business hours. Hours do not roll over between months.

title: Monthly Comprehensive Plan
shortDesc: Full-service monthly care coordination with expanded hours and priority access.
longDesc: For patients managing complex, ongoing health needs, the Monthly Comprehensive Plan offers the most complete level of support available. You'll receive all the benefits of the Essential Plan — ongoing coordination, provider communication, medication tracking, and family summaries — with more available hours and priority scheduling. Ideal for those managing multiple conditions, recent hospitalizations, or active care transitions. Hours do not roll over, this is not a 24/7 or emergency service, and all work is scheduled in advance.
